Wiil is a Conversation as a Service (CaaS) platform that enables businesses to deploy AI-powered voice and chat assistants without writing a single line of code. Transform your customer support, sales, and operations with intelligent assistants that work 24/7. 🚀 No-Code Deploy AI assistants without technical expertise 🕐 24/7 Always-on customer service across all channels 👥 Built-in CRM Automated customer profiling and recognition
Deploy AI assistants without technical expertise
Always-on customer service across all channels

Every business faces the same challenge: customers expect instant, 24/7 support, but staffing around the clock is expensive and impractical. Missed calls mean lost revenue. Delayed responses mean frustrated customers. 85% of customers whose calls go unanswered will not call back. Each missed call is a potential customer lost forever. Wiil solves this by deploying intelligent AI assistants that: Answer every call and chat instantly Handle bookings, orders, and inquiries automatically Qualify leads and collect customer information Escalate complex issues to human agents when needed

Wiil offers two types of AI assistants that work together to cover all customer communication channels: 📞 Phone Assistant Voice Calls Dedicated phone numbers (local or toll-free) Natural voice conversations Multilingual support (20+ languages) Smart call transfers to human agents SMS follow-up capabilities Call recording and transcription 💬 Web Assistant Chat & Web Calling Embeddable chat widget Three modes: Chat, Web Call, or Unified Customizable appearance and branding One-click integration (WordPress, Shopify, React) Real-time visitor engagement Conversation history and analytics

Behind every AI assistant is a powerful backend that handles real business operations. Wiil's Platform Services give your assistant the ability to actually do things—not just answer questions. Service Description Appointments AI books appointments, checks availability, and sends confirmations automatically Products & Orders Manage product catalogs and let AI process orders conversationally Menu Orders Restaurant-specific ordering with dine-in, takeout, and delivery support Reservations Table, room, or resource reservations with calendar integration Property Inquiry Real estate and property listing inquiries with automated lead capture Inventory Real-time stock tracking so AI provides accurate availability info Contacts (CRM) Built-in CRM that auto-qualifies and recognizes returning customers

One of Wiil's most powerful features is its automated CRM. Unlike traditional systems where staff manually enter customer data, Wiil's AI assistant: Auto-Qualifies Leads — Naturally requests name, phone, and email during conversations Recognizes Customers — Identifies returning customers by name or phone number Tracks Preferences — Records communication preferences for automated follow-ups Sends Confirmations — Automatically emails or texts booking confirmations

This guide walks you through configuring and deploying AI-powered assistants on the Wiil platform. Whether you're setting up a Phone Assistant to handle calls or a Web Assistant for your website, the process follows the same core steps. Setup Flow: Step Configuration Description 1 🤖 Choose Assistant Type Phone Assistant or Web Assistant 2 🌐 Voice & Language Select language and voice 3 🎯 Role & Objective Choose template or create custom role 4 ⚙️ Capabilities Platform services (appointments, orders, etc.) 5 📚 Knowledge Base Text, website, or document sources 6 📡 Channel Config Phone: number purchase / Web: mode + URL 7 🚀 Testing & Deploy Pre-launch check, deploy, test Note: Steps 4 and 5 — at least one must be configured.
Wiil offers two types of AI assistants that work together to cover all customer communication channels.

Your AI-powered phone line that handles calls and SMS automatically. Customers call a dedicated number and interact with your assistant via natural voice conversation. Key Features: Dedicated phone numbers (local or toll-free) Natural voice conversations Multilingual support (20+ languages) Smart call transfers to human agents SMS follow-up capabilities Call recording and transcription Best For: Businesses that receive phone inquiries, appointment-based services, customer support lines.

An embeddable widget for your website that engages visitors through chat or voice calls directly in their browser. Key Features: Embeddable chat widget Three modes: Chat, Web Call, or Unified Customizable appearance and branding One-click integration (WordPress, Shopify, React) Real-time visitor engagement Conversation history and analytics Best For: E-commerce sites, SaaS products, service businesses with web presence.

Aspect Phone Assistant Web Assistant Channel Phone calls, SMS Website chat, web calls Customer reaches you via Dedicated phone number Widget on your website Voice support Always (primary mode) Optional (Unified or Voice mode) Text support SMS Chat (primary mode) Setup requirement Purchase phone number Enter website URL
Your assistant's voice and language shape how customers perceive your brand. A well-chosen voice builds trust instantly, while a mismatched accent or robotic tone can create friction.

Select the language your assistant will speak and understand. Wiil supports 30+ languages with native-quality pronunciation. Supported Languages include: English (US, UK) Spanish French German Portuguese Italian Japanese Arabic Hindi And 20+ more Tip: Consider your customer demographics. If most customers are from a specific region, match that accent. For diverse audiences, choose a clear, neutral voice.

Choose a voice that fits your assistant's personality. Voice Options: Female voices: Achernar, Aoede, Autonoe, Callirrhoe, Kore Male voices: Fenrir, Charon Neutral voices: Puck Phone-Specific Considerations: Clarity over style — Phone audio compresses sound. Choose voices that remain clear on poor connections. Pacing matters — Slower, more deliberate voices work better for phone. Callers can't re-read what they missed. Test on real phones — Preview in-browser, but always test on actual phone calls.

Your assistant's role defines its personality, expertise, and boundaries. A billing support specialist speaks differently than a sales representative—and customers notice. Recommended: Use Ready-Made Templates to get started quickly. These are pre-configured for common business use cases and can be customized later.

Wiil provides ready-made templates for common business use cases: Template Description Billing Support Specialist Helps customers with invoices and payment issues Technical Support Specialist Troubleshoots common problems with your product or service General Customer Support Answers frequent questions and routes complex issues to human agents Customer Onboarding Specialist Guides new customers through setup and account creation Sales Representative Qualifies leads and presents offers Create Custom Role Build your own assistant with a fully customizable prompt

If you select Create Custom, describe your assistant's purpose and behavior. Be specific—vague instructions lead to inconsistent responses. Key elements to include: What should it help users accomplish? What tone should it use (formal, friendly, professional)? What information sources or rules should it follow? What should it never do or discuss? Example Prompt: "You are Maria, a virtual assistant for Wiil Coffee. Your job is to greet customers, answer product questions, and help them schedule coffee tastings. Always be warm, concise, and proactive. Never discuss competitor products or make promises about discounts." Warning: Your role instructions shape every response your assistant gives. Test changes in sandbox mode before deploying to production.
Capabilities define the platform services your assistant can perform. These transform your assistant from a simple Q&A bot into an agent that can take real actions on behalf of your business.

Capability Description Appointment Management AI books appointments, checks availability, and sends confirmations automatically Reservation Management Table, room, or resource reservations with calendar integration Menu Management Restaurant-specific ordering with dine-in, takeout, and delivery support Product Management Product catalog browsing and conversational order processing Property Management Real estate listings, property inquiries, and automated lead capture

Important: At minimum, either Capabilities or Knowledge Base must be configured. Both can be provided, but at least one is required. An assistant needs something to do (capabilities) or something to know (knowledge base) to function. Configuration Assistant Can... Capabilities only Perform actions (book appointments, take orders) but limited Q&A Knowledge Base only Answer questions but cannot perform transactional actions Both (recommended) Answer questions AND perform actions

Your knowledge base is what transforms a generic AI into your assistant. The information you add here becomes the foundation for every answer your assistant gives—from business hours to service details to policies. Think of it as training a new employee: give them the information they need to answer customer questions correctly.

Text Input​ Enter business information directly. This is the fastest way to add content: Business hours and location Products and services offered Pricing information Frequently asked questions Return and refund policies Website Import​ Enter a website URL to automatically import content. The system crawls your site and extracts relevant information for your assistant. Document Upload​ Upload files to train your assistant. Supported formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, CSV, XLS, XLSX

Tip Example Be Specific Instead of "We have great prices," say "Haircuts start at $35, color treatments from $85" Answer Common Questions Include your top 10-15 FAQs with clear, conversational answers Include Policies Cancellation, refund, and booking policies help the assistant set expectations Keep It Current Update when prices, hours, or services change—outdated info frustrates customers Note: Your assistant can only answer questions about information in its knowledge base. If a topic isn't covered, it will offer to transfer the caller to a human (phone) or indicate it doesn't have that information (web).

Your AI assistant needs a phone number to receive calls. This dedicated number becomes your business's AI-powered phone line—customers call it just like any regular number, but your assistant answers 24/7. Number Types​ Type Best For Local Regional businesses. Area-specific numbers build trust with local customers. Toll-Free National businesses. 800/888/877/866 prefixes project nationwide presence. Selection Process​ Choose Number Type — Local or Toll-Free Add Label (optional) — e.g., "Main Support Line" Select from Available Numbers — Browse and purchase Tip: Choose a local number if most customers are in a specific region. Toll-free numbers work better for businesses serving customers across multiple states or nationwide. FAQs: Can I port my existing number? Coming soon. Can I have multiple numbers? Yes, each can be configured with different assistant behaviors. Are there setup fees? No setup fees for new numbers.

Select how visitors will interact with your assistant on your website: Mode Description Best For Website Chat Text-based chat widget Quick support, simple FAQs, mobile users, visitors who prefer typing Website Call Voice calling in browser Complex consultations, accessibility needs, hands-free interaction Unified Assistant (Recommended) Both text chat and voice calls Most businesses. Maximum flexibility with both options.

Enter your website URL to connect your assistant. This is the domain where your assistant will be deployed. Example: https://yourbusiness.com The platform validates your domain and generates a unique configuration for your assistant to serve on that website.

Before deploying, verify you've completed these essential steps: Step Phone Assistant Web Assistant Voice & Language Selected professional voice matching your brand Selected appropriate voice for your audience Role & Objective Defined clear instructions and call handling Defined clear instructions and personality Capabilities Configured relevant platform services Configured relevant platform services Knowledge Base Added comprehensive product/service information Added comprehensive information Channel Setup Purchased and configured phone number Entered website URL and selected mode

When you deploy your assistant, Wiil automatically: Validates your configuration Sets up knowledge sources Creates instruction configuration Creates agent configuration Sets up communication channel Creates deployment configuration Finalizes setup Phone Assistant: Once deployed, your assistant immediately starts receiving calls at your purchased number. Customers can call or text to interact. Web Assistant: Once deployed, you receive an embed code to add to your website. After adding the code, visitors can interact with your assistant.

Phone Assistant Testing​ Test Call — Make a test call to your assistant's number. Your assistant calls you back and simulates a real customer interaction. Test SMS — Send a test SMS message to see how your assistant responds to text inquiries. Testing Checklist: Greeting message sounds natural and professional Assistant correctly identifies customer intent Responses are accurate based on knowledge base Capabilities work correctly (appointments book, orders process) Operating hours are respected Web Assistant Testing​ Chat Test — Text-based conversation to verify responses Voice Test — Voice conversation to verify speech recognition and responses Testing Checklist: Greeting message appears correctly Knowledge base questions are answered accurately Chat conversations work smoothly Voice input and output work correctly (if enabled) Assistant handles "I don't know" scenarios gracefully Widget appearance matches your brand Tip: Test with questions your actual customers frequently ask. This helps identify gaps in your knowledge base before going live.

After deploying your assistant: Monitor Conversations — Track conversation quality and resolution rates in the dashboard Review Transcripts — Read conversation logs to identify improvement areas Update Knowledge Base — Add information based on questions your assistant couldn't answer Refine Role Instructions — Adjust personality and boundaries based on real interactions Scale Up — Add more channels, assistants, and advanced features Ready to get started? Navigate to your Wiil console and follow along with this guide.
Learn about AI assistants and choose the right type for your business needs.

An Assistant is your AI-powered helper that communicates with customers on your behalf. It has a name, personality, and handles conversations automatically through voice or text. Key Features: Personality - Give it a name and communication style Intelligence - Powered by advanced AI models Communication - Handles customer conversations automatically Availability - Works 24/7 without breaks
Wiil supports two types of assistants. Choose based on how customers will reach you.

Voice-based communication via dedicated phone numbers. What it does: Answers phone calls from customers Conducts natural voice conversations Handles SMS messages Transfers calls to human agents when needed Records and transcribes calls Best for: Businesses that receive phone inquiries Appointment-based services Customer support lines Customers who prefer talking over typing

Website-based communication via an embeddable widget. What it does: Provides chat widget for your website Handles text-based conversations Supports voice calls in browser (optional) Engages visitors in real-time Captures leads automatically Modes available: Mode Description Chat Only Text-based chat widget Voice Call Only Voice calling in browser Unified (Recommended) Both chat and voice options Best for: E-commerce websites SaaS products Service businesses with web presence Customers who prefer typing or browsing

Aspect 📞 Phone Assistant 💬 Web Assistant Channel Phone calls, SMS Website chat, web calls Customer reaches you via Dedicated phone number Widget on your website Voice support Always Optional (Unified or Voice mode) Text support SMS Chat Setup requirement Purchase phone number Enter website URL

Choose Phone Assistant if: Customers primarily contact you by phone You need a dedicated business phone line Voice communication is essential to your service Choose Web Assistant if: Customers primarily find you through your website You want to engage website visitors You prefer text-based or flexible communication Deploy both for complete coverage — Many businesses use Phone Assistant for calls and Web Assistant for their website.
Languages: 30+ languages with native-quality pronunciation Voices: Multiple voice options (male, female, neutral) Customization: Match voice to your brand personality

Services define what your customers can book through your AI assistant. Well-structured services with clear names, accurate durations, and detailed descriptions help your AI provide better recommendations. Navigate to Service Management > Services to access the service configuration interface.
The Services Management interface has two main tabs: Tab Purpose 1️⃣ Services View, add, and manage all bookable services 2️⃣ Categories Organize services into groups for easy navigation
Button Description 📥 Import Services Bulk import from CSV, Excel, or JSON ➕ Add Service Manually add a new service

# Column Description 1 Status Active or inactive indicator 2 Service Name Display name and description 3 Duration Service length in minutes 4 Price Service cost 5 Online Booking Whether customers can book online 6 Actions Edit, duplicate, or delete
Categories help organize your services logically. When customers ask about services, the assistant uses categories to narrow down recommendations.
Action Description 👁️ View Details See category info and assigned services ✏️ Edit Category Update name and settings 🗑️ Delete Category Remove empty categories
# Field Required Description 1 Category Name ✅ Yes Display name for the category 2 Description ❌ No Brief description of services 3 Display Order ❌ No Sort order in the list
Click + Add Service to open the creation form with three tabs.

# Field Required Description 1 Service Name ✅ Yes Customer-facing name 2 Category ❌ No Assign to a category 3 Description ❌ No What's included in the service 4 Price ✅ Yes Service cost (decimal format) 5 Duration ✅ Yes Length in minutes
# Field Description 1 Buffer Time Minutes between appointments for preparation 2 Max Daily Bookings Limit per day (or unlimited) 3 Online Booking Toggle to allow/disallow online booking
# Field Description 1 Active Status Whether service is available for booking 2 Display Order Sort position in service list 3 Deposit Required Optional upfront payment amount

# Practice Recommendation 1 Clear Names Use names customers would naturally say: "Men's Haircut" not "Service A1" 2 Accurate Durations Include time for setup and cleanup to avoid conflicts 3 Detailed Descriptions Your AI uses descriptions to answer "What does this include?" 4 Buffer Times Add 5-15 minute buffers for preparation between appointments tip Your AI assistant will automatically present these services to customers and handle the booking process based on your configuration.

The calendar is your central hub for appointment management. When your AI assistant books an appointment during a customer conversation, it appears here instantly. Navigate to Bookings & Activity > Appointments to access the appointment calendar.

Monitor your appointments at a glance: # Metric Description 1 📈 Total Appointments All appointments in the selected period 2 📆 Today Appointments scheduled for today 3 ✅ Confirmed Appointments confirmed and ready 4 ⏳ Pending Appointments awaiting confirmation

Access appointments through three views: # View Description 1 📅 Calendar View Monthly grid with status indicators 2 ⏰ Upcoming Chronological list of future appointments 3 📋 All Appointments Complete history with filtering and search

# Feature Description 1 📆 Monthly Grid All dates visible with appointment indicators 2 🔵 Today Highlighting Current date marked with highlight ring 3 ◀️ ▶️ Navigation Arrow buttons to move between months 4 👤 Customer Names Names with color-coded status dots Click any date to open a side panel showing all appointments for that day.

# Color Status Description 1 🟡 Amber Pending Awaiting confirmation 2 🟢 Green Confirmed Customer notified 3 🔵 Blue Completed Service delivered 4 🔴 Red Cancelled Appointment cancelled 5 ⚪ Gray No Show Customer didn't attend
Click + Add Appointment for walk-ins or phone bookings.

# Field Required Description 1 Select Customer ❌ No Choose from existing contacts 2 Customer Name ✅ Yes Full name of the customer 3 Customer Email ❌ No For appointment confirmations 4 Phone Number ❌ No For SMS notifications

# Field Required Description 1 Service ✅ Yes Select from configured services 2 Date ✅ Yes Appointment date 3 Time ✅ Yes Appointment start time 4 Duration 🔄 Auto Filled from service settings 5 Total Price 🔄 Auto Filled from service settings 6 Deposit Paid ❌ No Amount already paid
Sync your appointments with external calendars.
# Platform Description 1 📅 Google Calendar Sync with Google Calendar and Gmail 2 📧 Microsoft Outlook Integrate with Outlook calendar

# Feature Description 1 🔄 Two-Way Sync Appointments sync in both directions 2 ⚡ Real-Time Updates Changes reflect immediately 3 🚫 Availability Blocking External events block booking availability 4 ⚠️ Conflict Prevention AI checks availability before booking tip When connected, your AI assistant will automatically check your external calendar for conflicts before scheduling new appointments.
# Action Description 1 🔗 Calendar Integration Connect external calendars 2 ➕ Add Appointment Create new appointment info All appointment data is stored securely and can be exported for reporting.
If you have an existing service catalog—from another booking system, spreadsheet, or POS—you can import everything at once rather than entering services manually.
# Format Extension Description 1 📊 CSV .csv Comma-separated values 2 📗 Excel .xlsx Microsoft Excel spreadsheet 3 📋 JSON .json JavaScript Object Notation
Step Action 1️⃣ Navigate to Service Management > Services 2️⃣ Click Import Services 3️⃣ Drag and drop your file or click to browse 4️⃣ Review validation results 5️⃣ Click Import to complete

name,price,duration,description,buffer_time,online_booking Haircut,35.00,30,Classic haircut and styling,10,true Hair Coloring,85.00,90,Full color treatment,15,true Deep Tissue Massage,120.00,60,Therapeutic deep tissue,15,true Manicure,25.00,45,Basic nail care and polish,5,true

{ "services": [ { "name": "Haircut", "price": 35.00, "duration": 30, "description": "Classic haircut and styling", "buffer_time": 10, "online_booking": true }, { "name": "Deep Tissue Massage", "price": 120.00, "duration": 60, "description": "Therapeutic deep tissue", "buffer_time": 15, "online_booking": true } ] }

# Column Required Type Description 1 name ✅ Yes String Service display name 2 price ✅ Yes Number Service price (decimal) 3 duration ✅ Yes Integer Duration in minutes 4 description ❌ No String Service description 5 buffer_time ❌ No Integer Buffer time (minutes) 6 online_booking ❌ No Boolean Allow online booking (default: true) 7 active ❌ No Boolean Active status (default: true) 8 display_order ❌ No Integer Sort order in list
# Check Description 1 📁 Format Recognition File type is supported 2 📋 Required Columns All required fields present 3 🔢 Data Types Values match expected types 4 ⏱️ Duration Values Valid minute values

After successful import: # Result 1 Services appear in your Services table 2 Each service is set to Active by default 3 Online booking is enabled unless specified otherwise 4 Your AI assistant can immediately offer these services warning Ensure all price values are valid numbers and duration is specified in minutes. Invalid values will cause the import to fail. tip Download a sample template from the import modal to ensure your file structure is correct.

Your AI assistant handles the initial conversation and scheduling with customers. When a customer requests an appointment, the assistant checks availability, suggests times, and creates a booking—all appearing here for your review. Navigate to Bookings & Activity > Appointments to access appointment management.

Step Actor Action 1️⃣ 👤 Customer Requests appointment via AI assistant 2️⃣ 🤖 AI Assistant Checks availability, suggests times, creates booking 3️⃣ 🏢 Business Reviews and confirms appointment 4️⃣ 📧 System Sends confirmation to customer 5️⃣ 👤 Customer Receives notification via email or SMS info Confirming appointments promptly (within 2-4 hours) reduces no-shows and builds customer trust.
# View Description 1 📅 Calendar View Monthly calendar with status indicators 2 ⏰ Upcoming Upcoming appointments sorted by date 3 📋 All Appointments Complete history with filtering
Click + Add Appointment for walk-ins or phone bookings.

# Field Required Description 1 Select Contact ❌ No Choose existing contact 2 Customer Name ✅ Yes Full name of customer 3 Email Address ❌ No For confirmations and reminders 4 Phone Number ❌ No For SMS notifications

# Field Required Description 1 Service ✅ Yes Select from configured services 2 Date ✅ Yes Appointment date 3 Time ✅ Yes Appointment start time 4 Duration 🔄 Auto Auto-filled from service 5 Price 🔄 Auto Auto-filled from service 6 Deposit ❌ No Required deposit if applicable

Manage appointment status with one-click actions: # Action Effect 1 ✅ Confirm Confirms pending appointment, triggers notification 2 🔵 Mark Complete Marks appointment as successfully completed 3 ❌ Cancel Cancels appointment and notifies customer

When you confirm an appointment, the system automatically sends a notification based on customer preference. # Channel Description 1 📧 Email Confirmation email with appointment details 2 📱 SMS Text message for quick confirmation tip The customer's preferred communication channel is captured automatically during their conversation with your AI assistant.

Click any appointment to view: # Field Description 1 ✂️ Service Type of service booked 2 📅 Date & Time Scheduled appointment slot 3 🏷️ Status Current appointment status 4 👤 Customer Customer name 5 📧 Contact Email or phone number 6 ⏱️ Duration Length of appointment 7 💰 Price Service cost info All appointment data is stored securely and can be exported for reporting. Your AI assistant uses this history to provide better service recommendations.

If you have an existing menu—from your POS system, website, or spreadsheet—you can import everything at once rather than entering items manually. This is especially useful for restaurants with extensive menus.
# Format Extension Description 1 📊 CSV .csv Comma-separated values 2 📗 Excel .xlsx Microsoft Excel spreadsheet 3 📋 JSON .json JavaScript Object Notation
Step Action 1️⃣ Navigate to Service Management > Menu 2️⃣ Click Import Menu 3️⃣ Drag and drop your file or click to browse 4️⃣ Review validation results 5️⃣ Click Import to complete

name,category,price,description,calories,prep_time,available Caesar Salad,Appetizers,12.99,Fresh romaine with house dressing,320,10,true Grilled Salmon,Main Course,28.99,Atlantic salmon with vegetables,450,25,true Tiramisu,Desserts,9.99,Classic Italian dessert,380,5,true Margherita Pizza,Main Course,18.99,Fresh mozzarella and basil,680,20,true

{ "menu_items": [ { "name": "Caesar Salad", "category": "Appetizers", "price": 12.99, "description": "Fresh romaine with house dressing", "calories": 320, "prep_time": 10, "available": true }, { "name": "Grilled Salmon", "category": "Main Course", "price": 28.99, "description": "Atlantic salmon with vegetables", "calories": 450, "prep_time": 25, "available": true } ] }

# Column Required Type Description 1 name ✅ Yes String Menu item display name 2 category ✅ Yes String Menu category (auto-created if new) 3 price ✅ Yes Number Item price (decimal) 4 description ❌ No String Item description 5 ingredients ❌ No String Comma-separated ingredient list 6 allergens ❌ No String Comma-separated allergen list 7 calories ❌ No Integer Calorie count 8 prep_time ❌ No Integer Preparation time in minutes 9 available ❌ No Boolean Item availability (default: true)

# Check Description 1 📁 Format Recognition File type is supported 2 📋 Required Columns All required fields present 3 🔢 Data Types Values match expected types 4 🏷️ Categories New categories auto-created

After successful import: # Result 1 Menu items appear in your Menu Items table 2 Each item is set to Available by default 3 New categories are automatically created 4 Your AI assistant can immediately offer these items info Categories that don't exist will be automatically created during import. New categories will appear in your Menu Management dashboard. tip Download a sample template from the import modal to ensure your file structure is correct before preparing your data.

When your AI assistant takes a food order, it appears here immediately. The assistant already confirmed the order type (dine-in, takeout, delivery), asked for quantities, and captured any special instructions—you just need to prepare and fulfill the order. Navigate to Bookings & Activity > Orders to access order management.

Step Actor Action 1️⃣ 👤 Customer Places order via AI assistant 2️⃣ 🤖 AI Assistant Confirms items, quantities, order type 3️⃣ 🏢 Business Reviews and confirms order 4️⃣ 👨‍🍳 Kitchen Prepares the order 5️⃣ 📧 System Notifies customer when ready info Fast order confirmation is critical for food service. Customers expect quick acknowledgment, especially for delivery orders.
# Metric Description 1 ⏳ Pending Orders awaiting confirmation 2 👨‍🍳 In Progress Orders being prepared 3 ✅ Ready Orders ready for pickup/delivery 4 🟢 Completed Successfully fulfilled orders

# Tab Description 1 ⏳ Pending Orders Orders waiting to be confirmed (require immediate attention) 2 👨‍🍳 Current Orders Orders being prepared or ready for pickup 3 📋 All Orders Complete order history including completed and cancelled

Your AI assistant confirms the order type during the conversation: # Type Description 1 🍽️ Dine In Customer eats at the restaurant 2 ☕ Takeout Customer picks up the order 3 🚗 Delivery Order delivered to customer tip During AI conversations, the assistant asks customers about order type and quantity of items. This information is captured automatically in the order details.

# Color Status Description 1 🟠 Orange Pending Awaiting confirmation 2 🔵 Blue Confirmed Order accepted 3 🟣 Purple In Progress Being prepared 4 🟢 Green Ready Ready for pickup/delivery 5 ✅ Teal Completed Successfully fulfilled 6 🔴 Red Cancelled Order cancelled

# Column Description 1 Order # Unique order identifier 2 Type Dine In, Takeout, or Delivery 3 Customer Customer name 4 Items Number of menu items ordered 5 Total Order total amount 6 Status Current order status 7 Payment Payment method (Card/Cash) 8 Time When the order was placed
# Filter Description 1 🔍 Search Search by order number or customer name 2 🏷️ Status Filter Filter by order status 3 🍽️ Type Filter Filter by Dine In, Takeout, or Delivery
Click + Add New Order for phone orders or walk-ins.

# Field Required Description 1 Customer Name ✅ Yes Full name of the customer 2 Phone Number ❌ No Contact number for the order 3 Address ❌ No Delivery address (if applicable) 4 Order Type ✅ Yes Dine In, Takeout, or Delivery 5 Special Instructions ❌ No Any special requests or notes
# Field Description 1 Select Items Choose from your menu items 2 Quantity Number of each item 3 Item Notes Special requests per item

Step Status Action 1️⃣ Pending Order received, awaiting confirmation 2️⃣ Confirmed Order accepted by business 3️⃣ In Progress Kitchen preparing the order 4️⃣ Ready Order ready for pickup/delivery 5️⃣ Completed Order fulfilled successfully tip Status updates trigger automatic notifications to customers via their preferred communication method (email or SMS).

Click any order to view: # Field Description 1 🔢 Order Number Unique identifier 2 🍽️ Order Type Dine In, Takeout, or Delivery 3 👤 Customer Customer name and contact 4 📍 Address Delivery address (if applicable) 5 🍕 Items List of ordered items with quantities 6 💰 Total Order total 7 💳 Payment Payment method 8 📝 Notes Special instructions info All order data is stored securely and can be exported for reporting. Your AI assistant uses order history to provide better service.

Your menu is what your AI assistant offers to customers. Click + Add Menu Item to open the creation form with four tabs.

# Field Required Description 1 Menu Item Name ✅ Yes Display name (e.g., "Grilled Salmon") 2 Price ✅ Yes Item price in your currency 3 Description ❌ No Detailed description of the item 4 Category ❌ No Select from existing categories

# Field Description 1 🔥 Calories Calorie count per serving 2 🥩 Protein Grams per serving 3 🌾 Carbs Grams per serving 4 💧 Fat Grams per serving

# Practice Recommendation 1 Create Categories First Better organization before adding items 2 Clear Names Use names customers will understand 3 Updated Prices Keep prices current to avoid confusion 4 Allergen Info Add allergens for customer safety 5 Display Order Control how items appear in the menu tip Your AI assistant uses menu descriptions and allergen information to answer customer questions like "What's in the Caesar Salad?" or "Is this dish gluten-free?"
Platform Services extend your AI assistant beyond conversation into real business operations. Each service you enable gives your assistant the ability to take action on behalf of your business.

Organize your products into categories for better navigation and filtering.
# Action Description 1 👁️ View Details See category info and products 2 ✏️ Edit Category Update name and settings 3 🗑️ Delete Category Remove empty categories

Click + Add Category to create a new category: # Field Required Description 1 Category Name ✅ Yes Name for the category 2 Description ❌ No Category description 3 Display Order ❌ No Sort position in category list
Click + Add Product to open the product creation form with four tabs.

# Field Required Description 1 Product Name ✅ Yes Display name for the product 2 Category ✅ Yes Assign to a category 3 Description ❌ No Product details and specifications 4 Price ✅ Yes Product price 5 SKU ❌ No Stock keeping unit identifier 6 Brand ❌ No Manufacturer or brand name 7 Barcode ❌ No UPC/EAN barcode

# Setting Description 1 Track Inventory Enable/disable stock tracking for this product 2 Stock Quantity Current available stock (when tracking enabled) 3 Low Stock Alert Threshold for low stock notifications
# Field Description 1 Weight Product weight 2 Unit Weight unit (lbs, kg, oz, g) 3 Length Product length dimension 4 Width Product width dimension 5 Height Product height dimension
# Setting Description 1 Active Status Product visibility in the catalog 2 Display Order Sort position in product list

# Practice Description 1 📝 Use Clear Product Names Names customers would search for: "Wireless Earbuds Pro" not "SKU-WE-001" 2 📦 Keep Stock Updated Your AI tells customers when items are out of stock—incorrect data frustrates buyers 3 📄 Add Helpful Descriptions Include key specs so your AI can answer "Does this work with iPhone?" 4 🏷️ Organize by Category Helps AI narrow down options when customers say "Show me your headphones" tip Products with Track Inventory enabled will show stock levels and alert you when running low. info Required fields are marked with an asterisk (*). Complete at least the Basic tab to save a product.

If you have an existing product catalog—from an e-commerce platform, spreadsheet, or POS system—you can import everything at once. This is especially useful when setting up your account or migrating from another system. Navigate to Service Management > Products and click Import Products.
Click Import Products from the Product Management dashboard to open the import modal.
# Format Extension Description 1 📊 CSV .csv Comma-separated values file 2 📗 Excel .xlsx Microsoft Excel spreadsheet 3 📋 JSON .json JavaScript Object Notation file
Your import file must include the required columns. Below are examples for each format.

category,name,sku,price,stock,description Accessories,Braided USB-C Cable,SKU-003,19.99,500,6ft premium cable Accessories,Wireless Charger Pad,SKU-005,34.99,250,Fast charging compatible Smartphones,Aura Phone Lite,SKU-001,449.99,150,Entry-level smartphone Wearables,Fittrack V5,SKU-004,179.99,200,Fitness smartwatch

A B C D E F category name sku price stock description Accessories Braided USB-C Cable SKU-003 19.99 500 6ft premium cable Accessories Wireless Charger Pad SKU-005 34.99 250 Fast charging compatible Smartphones Aura Phone Lite SKU-001 449.99 150 Entry-level smartphone

{ "products": [ { "category": "Accessories", "name": "Braided USB-C Cable", "sku": "SKU-003", "price": 19.99, "stock": 500, "description": "6ft premium cable" }, { "category": "Smartphones", "name": "Aura Phone Lite", "sku": "SKU-001", "price": 449.99, "stock": 150, "description": "Entry-level smartphone" } ] }

# Column Required Type Description 1 category ✅ Yes String Category name (must exist) 2 name ✅ Yes String Product display name 3 sku ✅ Yes String Unique product identifier 4 price ✅ Yes Number Product price (decimal) 5 stock ❌ No Integer Available quantity 6 description ❌ No String Product description 7 brand ❌ No String Manufacturer name 8 barcode ❌ No String UPC/EAN barcode

After uploading, the system validates your file: # Check Description 1 📁 File Format Verifies file type is CSV, XLSX, or JSON 2 📋 Required Columns Checks all required columns are present 3 📦 Product Count Shows number of products ready to import 4 🏷️ Category Validation Confirms all referenced categories exist

Step Action 1️⃣ Upload your file via drag-and-drop or file browser 2️⃣ System validates file format and structure 3️⃣ Review validation results and product count 4️⃣ Click Import Products to complete the import warning Categories referenced in your import file must already exist. Create categories first in the Categories tab before importing products. tip Download a sample template from the import modal to ensure your file structure is correct before preparing your data.
View and manage all products in your catalog from the Product Management dashboard. Navigate to Service Management > Products to access product management.

Click the ••• menu on any product row to access actions: # Action Description 1 👁️ View Details See full product information including inventory and settings 2 ✏️ Edit Product Update product details, pricing, and inventory 3 🗑️ Delete Product Remove product from catalog permanently
Toggle product visibility in your catalog: # Status Description 1 🟢 Active Product is visible to customers and AI assistant 2 ⚪ Inactive Product is hidden from catalog

For products with inventory tracking enabled: # Status Indicator Threshold 1 🟢 In Stock Green 150+ units available 2 🟡 Low Stock Amber Less than 20 units 3 🔴 Out of Stock Red 0 units available info Your AI assistant uses stock information to inform customers about product availability and can suggest alternatives for out-of-stock items.

Select multiple products to perform bulk operations: # Action Description 1 ✅ Set Active Make selected products visible 2 ⏸️ Set Inactive Hide selected products from catalog 3 🏷️ Update Category Move products to a different category 4 🗑️ Delete Selected Remove multiple products at once

Use the search bar and filters to find products: # Filter Description 1 🔍 Search Search by product name, SKU, or description 2 🏷️ Category Filter by product category 3 🔵 Status Filter by active/inactive status

To edit a product: Step Action 1️⃣ Click the ••• menu on the product row 2️⃣ Select Edit Product 3️⃣ Update fields across Basic, Inventory, Physical, or Settings tabs 4️⃣ Click Save Changes tip Use the SKU field for quick product identification and inventory management. warning Deleting a product is permanent. Consider setting it to Inactive if you may need it again later.

When your AI assistant helps a customer purchase a product, the order appears here as "Pending." You review it, confirm payment, and update the status as you fulfill the order. Customers receive automatic notifications at each stage. Navigate to Bookings & Activity > Orders to access product order management.

Step Actor Action 1️⃣ 👤 Customer Orders via AI Assistant 2️⃣ 📥 System Order appears as Pending 3️⃣ 🏢 Business Confirms and processes order 4️⃣ 📧 System Customer notified 5️⃣ 🏢 Business Fulfills and ships order 6️⃣ ✅ Complete Order marked complete

# Status Color Description 1 ⏳ Pending Amber Awaiting confirmation 2 🔄 In Progress Blue Order being processed 3 📦 Shipped Violet Order shipped to customer 4 ✅ Completed Green Order delivered and complete 5 ❌ Cancelled Red Order cancelled
# Tab Description 1 ⏳ Pending Orders Orders awaiting confirmation 2 🔄 Current Orders Orders in progress or shipped 3 📋 All Orders Complete order history

# Column Description 1 🔢 Order # Unique order identifier 2 👤 Customer Customer name and email 3 📦 Items Number of items and product names 4 💰 Total Order total with tax 5 🔵 Status Current order status 6 💳 Payment Payment status (Pending/Paid) 7 📅 Date Order date 8 ⚙️ Actions View, edit, or update options
Click + Add Order to create an order manually. The modal has 3 tabs.

# Field Required Description 1 Select Contact ❌ No Choose from existing contacts 2 First Name ✅ Yes Customer's first name 3 Last Name ✅ Yes Customer's last name 4 Email ✅ Yes Customer's email address 5 Phone ❌ No Customer's phone number
# Feature Description 1 🏷️ Category Filter Filter products by category 2 📋 Product List Browse available products 3 ➕ Add Button Add products to the order 4 🔢 Quantity Adjust item quantities

# Field Required Description 1 Street Address ✅ Yes Primary street address 2 Apartment/Suite ❌ No Additional address info 3 City ✅ Yes City name 4 State ✅ Yes State or province 5 ZIP Code ✅ Yes Postal code

Click any order row to view full details: # Section Description 1 📋 Order Header Order number, status, and date 2 👤 Customer Info Name, email, phone, customer ID 3 📍 Shipping Address Delivery address details 4 📦 Order Items Products, quantities, and prices 5 💰 Order Summary Subtotal, tax, shipping, and total

Update order status as you process and fulfill orders: # Action Effect 1 ✅ Confirm Order Move from Pending to In Progress 2 🔄 Mark In Progress Indicate order is being processed 3 📦 Mark Shipped Record shipping with tracking info 4 ✅ Complete Order Mark order as delivered 5 ❌ Cancel Order Cancel with customer notification

# Status Description 1 🟡 Pending Payment not yet received 2 🟢 Paid Payment confirmed 3 🔴 Failed Payment failed or declined 4 🔵 Refunded Payment refunded to customer info When you update an order status, the system automatically sends a notification to the customer via their preferred communication channel (email or SMS). tip Orders placed by the AI Assistant start as Pending. Review the order details and click Confirm Order to begin processing.

Resources are the things customers can reserve—hotel rooms, restaurant tables, event spaces, or equipment. Your AI assistant uses this information to check availability and make bookings in real-time. Each resource type has specific fields (rooms need nightly rates, tables need capacity) so your assistant can answer questions like "Do you have a table for 6 tonight?" or "What's the rate for a suite?" Navigate to Service Management > Resources to access the resource configuration interface.
The Resource Management interface has two main tabs: Tab Purpose 1️⃣ Resources View and manage all reservable resources 2️⃣ Resource Types Configure different types of reservable resources

Select the type of resource you want to add: # Type Description 1 🏨 Hotel Rooms Guest rooms, suites, villas with nightly rates 2 🍽️ Restaurant Tables Dining tables with capacity and time slots 3 ⏱️ Hourly Rentals Equipment or spaces rented by the hour
Button Description 📥 Import Resources Bulk import from CSV, Excel, or JSON ➕ Add Resource Manually add a new reservable resource

# Column Description 1 Status Available, Occupied, or Maintenance 2 Resource Name and description 3 Type Hotel Room, Restaurant Table, or Hourly Rental 4 Capacity Maximum guests or users 5 Price Per night, per hour, or no fee 6 Actions Edit, duplicate, or delete
Click + Add Resource to open the resource creation form with two tabs.

# Field Required Description 1 Resource Name ✅ Yes Display name (e.g., "Deluxe Ocean View Suite") 2 Resource Type ✅ Yes Hotel Room, Restaurant Table, or Hourly Rental 3 Capacity ✅ Yes Maximum guests or users 4 Description ❌ No Resource details and features 5 Price ✅ Yes Per night, per hour, or booking fee 6 Status ✅ Yes Available, Occupied, or Maintenance
# Field Description 1 Features Add tags like WiFi, Ocean View, King Bed 2 Images Upload PNG or JPG images (up to 5MB)
Each resource type has unique configuration options:
# Field Description 1 Capacity Maximum guests 2 Price per Night Nightly rate 3 Room Type Standard, Deluxe, Suite, etc. 4 Amenities WiFi, TV, AC, Minibar, etc.
# Field Description 1 Seating Capacity Number of seats 2 Table Location Window, Patio, Private Room 3 Minimum Spend Optional minimum requirement 4 Time Slot Duration Default reservation length

# Field Description 1 Hourly Rate Price per hour 2 Min/Max Duration Booking time limits 3 Usage Capacity Maximum users 4 Equipment Included What's provided tip Add detailed descriptions and high-quality images to help your AI assistant accurately describe resources to customers. info Required fields are marked with an asterisk (*). Complete at least the Basic Info tab to save a resource.

The built-in calendar provides a complete view of all reservations. Your AI assistant automatically books reservations here based on customer conversations. Navigate to Bookings & Activity > Reservations to access the reservation calendar.

Monitor your reservations at a glance: # Metric Description 1 📈 Total Reservations All reservations in the selected period 2 📆 Today Reservations scheduled for today 3 ✅ Confirmed Reservations confirmed and ready 4 ⏳ Pending Reservations awaiting confirmation

Access reservations through three views: # View Description 1 📅 Calendar Monthly grid with capacity or individual views 2 ⏰ Current Today's and upcoming reservations sorted by date 3 📋 All Reservations Complete history with filtering, search, and export

# Feature Description 1 📆 Monthly Grid All dates visible with reservation indicators 2 🔵 Today Highlighting Current date marked with highlight ring 3 ◀️ ▶️ Navigation Arrow buttons to move between months 4 👤 Customer Names Names with color-coded status dots Click any date to open a side panel showing all reservations for that day.

# Color Status Description 1 🟡 Amber Pending Awaiting confirmation 2 🟢 Green Confirmed Customer notified 3 🔵 Blue Completed Reservation fulfilled 4 🔴 Red Cancelled Reservation cancelled 5 ⚪ Gray No Show Customer didn't arrive
Click Settings to configure reservation behavior for each resource type.

# Setting Description 1 Capacity-Based Multiple customers book same slot until capacity reached 2 Resource-Specific Each table booked by one customer at a time 3 Default Duration Set default reservation length (hours)
# Setting Description 1 Capacity-Based Book by total capacity (shared spaces) 2 Resource-Specific Each room booked exclusively 3 Default Duration Set default stay length (nights)
# Setting Description 1 Capacity-Based Multiple bookings by capacity 2 Resource-Specific Exclusive equipment bookings 3 Default Duration Set default rental period
Click + Add Reservation to manually create reservations.

# Field Required Description 1 Select Customer ❌ No Choose existing contact 2 Customer Name ✅ Yes Full name of customer 3 Customer Email ❌ No For confirmations and reminders 4 Phone Number ❌ No For SMS notifications

# Field Required Description 1 Reservation Type ✅ Yes Table, Room, or Rental 2 Number of Guests ❌ No Party size 3 Date ✅ Yes Reservation date 4 Time Slot ✅ Yes Available time slots shown with capacity 5 Total Price 🔄 Auto Calculated from resource settings 6 Deposit Paid ❌ No Amount already paid 7 Special Notes ❌ No Requests, dietary restrictions, etc.

# Action Description 1 ⚙️ Settings Configure reservation behavior 2 ➕ Add Reservation Create new reservation info The day panel adapts based on your selected view mode, showing either capacity summaries or individual reservation details.
Quickly add multiple reservable resources at once by importing from a file. If you have an existing inventory—from another system, spreadsheet, or database—you can import everything at once.
# Format Extension Description 1 📊 CSV .csv Comma-separated values 2 📗 Excel .xlsx Microsoft Excel spreadsheet 3 📋 JSON .json JavaScript Object Notation

Step Action 1️⃣ Navigate to Service Management > Resources 2️⃣ Click Import Resources 3️⃣ Select your resource type (Hotel Rooms, Tables, or Rentals) 4️⃣ Drag and drop your file or click to browse 5️⃣ Review validation results 6️⃣ Click Import to complete

# Column Required Type Description 1 name ✅ Yes String Room name/number 2 room_type ✅ Yes String Standard, Deluxe, Suite, etc. 3 capacity ✅ Yes Integer Max guest capacity 4 price_per_night ✅ Yes Number Nightly rate (decimal) 5 status ✅ Yes String Available, Occupied, Maintenance 6 amenities ❌ No String Semicolon-separated list

# Column Required Type Description 1 table_number ✅ Yes String Table identifier 2 capacity ✅ Yes Integer Max seating capacity 3 location ✅ Yes String Patio, Window, Private Room, etc. 4 status ✅ Yes String Available, Reserved, Occupied 5 min_spend ❌ No Number Minimum spend requirement

# Column Required Type Description 1 name ✅ Yes String Resource name 2 hourly_rate ✅ Yes Number Price per hour (decimal) 3 min_duration ✅ Yes Integer Minimum booking hours 4 max_duration ✅ Yes Integer Maximum booking hours 5 status ✅ Yes String Available, Booked, Maintenance
# Check Description 1 📁 Format Recognition File type is supported 2 📦 Resource Type Matches selected type 3 📋 Required Columns All required fields present 4 🔢 Data Types Values match expected types

After successful import: # Result 1 Resources appear in your Resources table 2 Each resource is set to Available by default 3 Your AI assistant can immediately offer these resources warning Ensure your file structure matches the selected resource type. Mismatched columns will cause the import to fail. tip Download a sample template for each resource type from the import modal to ensure your file structure is correct.

Your AI assistant handles reservation requests in real-time—checking availability, suggesting alternatives when needed, and booking directly. All reservations appear here for you to review, confirm, and manage. Navigate to Bookings & Activity > Reservations to access reservation management.

Step Actor Action 1️⃣ 👤 Customer Requests reservation via AI assistant 2️⃣ 🤖 AI Assistant Checks availability, suggests options, creates booking 3️⃣ 🏢 Business Reviews and confirms reservation 4️⃣ 📧 System Sends confirmation to customer 5️⃣ 👤 Customer Receives notification via email or SMS info Confirming reservations promptly reduces no-shows and builds customer trust.
# View Description 1 📅 Calendar View Monthly calendar with capacity or individual views 2 ⏰ Current Today's and upcoming reservations 3 📋 All Reservations Complete history with filtering and search
# Metric Description 1 📈 Total Reservations All reservations in period 2 📆 Today Today's scheduled reservations 3 ✅ Confirmed Reservations confirmed 4 ⏳ Pending Awaiting confirmation

Shows overall capacity and availability for each day: # Indicator Description 1 🟢 75%+ High availability 2 🟡 35-74% Moderate availability 3 🔴 100% Fully booked Day Panel shows: Booked count Available slots Overall capacity percentage Pending vs Confirmed breakdown
Shows individual reservations like appointments: # Indicator Description 1 🟢 Green border Confirmed reservation 2 🟡 Amber border Pending reservation 3 👤 Customer name Individual booking displayed
Click + Add Reservation for walk-ins or phone bookings.

# Field Required Description 1 Select Contact ❌ No Choose existing contact 2 First Name ✅ Yes Customer's first name 3 Last Name ✅ Yes Customer's last name 4 Email Address ❌ No For confirmations and reminders

# Field Required Description 1 Resource Type ✅ Yes Table, Room, or Rental 2 Guests ❌ No Number of guests 3 Date ✅ Yes Reservation date 4 Time Slot ✅ Yes Select available time 5 Price 🔄 Auto Auto-filled from resource 6 Deposit ❌ No Required deposit amount

Manage reservation status with one-click actions: # Action Effect 1 ✅ Confirm Confirms pending reservation, triggers notification 2 🔵 Mark Complete Marks reservation as successfully completed 3 ❌ Cancel Cancels reservation and notifies customer

# Color Status Description 1 🟡 Amber Pending Awaiting confirmation 2 🟢 Green Confirmed Customer notified 3 🔵 Blue Completed Reservation fulfilled 4 🔴 Red Cancelled Reservation cancelled 5 ⚪ Gray No Show Customer didn't arrive

When you confirm a reservation, the system automatically sends a notification based on customer preference. # Channel Description 1 📧 Email Confirmation email with reservation details 2 📱 SMS Text message for quick confirmation tip The customer's preferred communication channel is captured automatically during their conversation with your AI assistant.

Click any reservation to view: # Field Description 1 🏨 Resource Table, room, or rental booked 2 📅 Date & Time Scheduled reservation slot 3 🏷️ Status Current reservation status 4 👤 Customer Customer name 5 📧 Contact Email or phone number 6 👥 Guests Number of guests 7 💰 Price Reservation cost 8 💵 Deposit Amount paid info All reservation data is stored securely and can be exported for reporting. Your AI assistant uses this history to provide better service recommendations.
